nodes.description: 定义异步函数 getSenorIdArr，用于处理传感器数据的获取逻辑

lines: let SensorList = await sensor.getSensorList() //获取设备传感器的信息
this.supportSensorIds = SensorList.map<number>(item => item.sensorId) //将设备传感器的ID赋值给supportSensorIds

nodes.code: let SensorList = await sensor.getSensorList() //获取设备传感器的信息
nodes.description: 【Sink】调用 sensor.getSensorList() API 获取设备上所有可用传感器的详细信息列表

lines: let SensorList = await sensor.getSensorList() //获取设备传感器的信息
this.supportSensorIds = SensorList.map<number>(item => item.sensorId) //将设备传感器的ID赋值给supportSensorIds
